arts.sum: Dean Henderson admits Crystal Palace are yet to truly get going so far this season – but remains optimistic for the club’s fortunes given the players around him.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss provides Richards and Riad long-term injury update
arts.sum: I don’t expect them [Richards or Riad] to play before the next international break in November. Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner does not expect to have defensive duo Chris Richards or Chadi Riad back before the next international break.
